requirement_topic.en: SLSI Mandatory Certification + SLS Mark + Import Inspection (Market Access)
requirement_topic.zh: SLSI强制认证 + SLS标志 + 进口检验（市场准入）
requirement_topic.zht: SLSI強制認證 + SLS標誌 + 進口檢驗（市場准入）

summary.en: Refrigerators are a regulated electrical product for which the Sri Lanka Standards Institution （SLSI） operates mandatory certification and/or import-inspection control. Before goods clear customs and are supplied to the market, the product must conform to the applicable SLS standards （safety to SLS/IEC 60335-2-24, EMC via the CISPR 14 series, and energy performance via the SLSEA scheme） and carry the relevant SLS conformity mark where the product-certification route is used. The two principal SLSI routes are: （1） SLS product certification — a scheme licence permitting use of the SLS mark on the model after assessment of test evidence and, where applicable, factory/quality-system review; and （2） import-consignment inspection — testing and inspection of an imported batch at the port of entry （Colombo） before release. SLSI conformity is a precondition for customs clearance for regulated products; the importer of record arranges and holds the certification/inspection documentation.
summary.zh: 电冰箱属于受管制电气产品，斯里兰卡标准协会（SLSI）对其实施强制认证及/或进口检验控制。在货物清关并供应市场前，产品须符合适用的SLS标准（安全依据SLS/IEC 60335-2-24、EMC通过CISPR 14系列、能效通过SLSEA制度），并在采用产品认证路径时加贴相关SLS合格标志。SLSI两条主要路径为：（1）SLS产品认证——在评估检测证据并（适用时）审查工厂/质量体系后，授予可在该型号上使用SLS标志的方案许可；（2）进口批次检验——在入境口岸（科伦坡）对进口批次进行测试和检验后放行。对受管制产品而言，SLSI合格性是清关的前提条件；登记进口商负责安排并持有认证/检验文件。
summary.zht: 電冰箱屬於受管制電氣產品，斯里蘭卡標準協會（SLSI）對其實施強制認證及/或進口檢驗控制。在貨物清關並供應市場前，產品須符合適用的SLS標準（安全依據SLS/IEC 60335-2-24、EMC通過CISPR 14系列、能效通過SLSEA制度），並在採用產品認證路徑時加貼相關SLS合格標誌。SLSI兩條主要路徑為：（1）SLS產品認證——在評估檢測證據並（適用時）審查工廠/質量體系後，授予可在該型號上使用SLS標誌的方案許可；（2）進口批次檢驗——在入境口岸（科倫坡）對進口批次進行測試和檢驗後放行。對受管制產品而言，SLSI合格性是清關的前提條件；登記進口商負責安排並持有認證/檢驗文件。

standards_or_laws: Sri Lanka Standards Institution Act — SLSI product certification scheme and SLS mark licensing
SLSI import inspection scheme for regulated electrical products (consignment testing/inspection at port of entry)
SLS/IEC 60335-2-24 (safety), IEC/CISPR 14 series (EMC), SLSEA energy label/MEPS — underlying conformity requirements

summary.en: In China, refrigerators require China Compulsory Certification （CCC） covering safety （GB 4706.13） and EMC （GB 4343.1） before sale, plus the China Energy Label （GB 12021.2）. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification by CNCA-designated bodies, administered by SAMR; the CCC mark is affixed to certified products. CCC governs domestic-market access in China and is not recognised by SLSI for Sri Lanka market access — there is no mutual recognition of the CCC mark as the SLS mark, although IEC-based test reports underlying CCC （e.g., IEC 60335-2-24, CISPR 14-1） can be re-used as evidence in the SLSI route.
summary.zh: 在中国，电冰箱在销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和EMC（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），并须具备中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）。CCC为由CNCA指定机构进行的强制性第三方认证，由SAMR管理；CCC标志加贴于认证产品。CCC管控中国国内市场准入，不被SLSI认可为斯里兰卡市场准入依据——CCC标志与SLS标志之间无互认，尽管CCC底层的IEC类检测报告（如IEC 60335-2-24、CISPR 14-1）可在SLSI路径中作为证据复用。
summary.zht: 在中國，電冰箱在銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和EMC（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），並須具備中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）。CCC為由CNCA指定機構進行的強制性第三方認證，由SAMR管理；CCC標誌加貼於認證產品。CCC管控中國國內市場准入，不被SLSI認可為斯里蘭卡市場准入依據——CCC標誌與SLS標誌之間無互認，儘管CCC底層的IEC類檢測報告（如IEC 60335-2-24、CISPR 14-1）可在SLSI路徑中作為證據複用。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — based on GB 12021.2-2015 (NDRC/SAMR)

gap.en: Chinese exporters must obtain SLSI conformity from scratch — the CCC mark and China Energy Label do not grant Sri Lanka market access: （1） choose and complete an SLSI route — SLS product certification （for the SLS mark on the model） or import-consignment inspection at Colombo; （2） supply test evidence to SLS/IEC 60335-2-24 （safety） and CISPR 14 （EMC）, ideally as IECEE CB / internationally recognised reports, which SLSI can accept toward conformity; （3） complete the SLSEA energy-label registration and ensure the model meets the MEPS floor （see energy rows）; （4） confirm refrigerant documentation （R-600a charge, Annex AA） is in the file; （5） ensure the appliance is rated 230 V/50 Hz and that markings/instructions suit the market. All of this is arranged through the Sri Lanka importer of record, who holds the documentation for customs clearance. Confirm the current SLSI scheme route, fee, and the exact SLS standard references with SLSI / the importer.
gap.zh: 中国出口商须从头取得SLSI合格性——CCC标志和中国能效标识不授予斯里兰卡市场准入：（1）选择并完成一条SLSI路径——SLS产品认证（在型号上加贴SLS标志）或在科伦坡进行进口批次检验；（2）提交依据SLS/IEC 60335-2-24（安全）和CISPR 14（EMC）的检测证据，最好为IECEE CB/国际认可报告，SLSI可据此用于合格评定；（3）完成SLSEA能效标签注册并确保型号达到MEPS下限（见能效行）；（4）确认制冷剂文件（R-600a充注量、附件AA）在档；（5）确保器具按230 V/50 Hz定额且标识/说明书适合该市场。上述事项均通过登记进口商安排，由其持有清关文件。请向SLSI/进口商确认现行SLSI制度路径、费用及具体SLS标准编号。
gap.zht: 中國出口商須從頭取得SLSI合格性——CCC標誌和中國能效標識不授予斯里蘭卡市場准入：（1）選擇並完成一條SLSI路徑——SLS產品認證（在型號上加貼SLS標誌）或在科倫坡進行進口批次檢驗；（2）提交依據SLS/IEC 60335-2-24（安全）和CISPR 14（EMC）的檢測證據，最好為IECEE CB/國際認可報告，SLSI可據此用於合格評定；（3）完成SLSEA能效標籤登記並確保型號達到MEPS下限（見能效行）；（4）確認製冷劑文件（R-600a充注量、附件AA）在檔；（5）確保器具按230 V/50 Hz定額且標識/說明書適合該市場。上述事項均通過登記進口商安排，由其持有清關文件。請向SLSI/進口商確認現行SLSI制度路徑、費用及具體SLS標準編號。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SLSI conformity (SLS product certification or import inspection) is a precondition for customs clearance and market supply of refrigerators in Sri Lanka
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label required before sale in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SLSI conformity — via SLS product certification or import-consignment inspection — is a hard gate for refrigerators entering Sri Lanka, separate from and not satisfied by the Chinese CCC mark. Underlying IEC-based test reports （IEC 60335-2-24, CISPR 14-1） can be re-used as evidence. Arrange the SLSI route, SLSEA energy label, and refrigerant documentation through the Sri Lanka importer of record before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] SLSI合格性——通过SLS产品认证或进口批次检验——是电冰箱进入斯里兰卡的强制门槛，独立于中国CCC标志且不能被其满足。底层IEC类检测报告（IEC 60335-2-24、CISPR 14-1）可作为证据复用。请在出货前通过斯里兰卡登记进口商安排SLSI路径、SLSEA能效标签及制冷剂文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] SLSI合格性——通過SLS產品認證或進口批次檢驗——是電冰箱進入斯里蘭卡的強制門檻，獨立於中國CCC標誌且不能被其滿足。底層IEC類檢測報告（IEC 60335-2-24、CISPR 14-1）可作為證據複用。請在出貨前通過斯里蘭卡登記進口商安排SLSI路徑、SLSEA能效標籤及製冷劑文件。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer of Record + Customs Clearance (Colombo)
requirement_topic.zh: 本地登记进口商 + 清关（科伦坡）
requirement_topic.zht: 本地登記進口商 + 清關（科倫坡）

summary.en: Goods placed on the Sri Lanka market must be brought in by a Sri Lanka-resident importer of record, who is the responsible party for customs clearance, SLSI conformity documentation, SLSEA energy-label registration, and ongoing market obligations. Refrigerators arrive predominantly through the Port of Colombo and are cleared by Sri Lanka Customs against the import documentation, applicable duties/taxes, and any SLSI import-inspection or certification evidence required for the regulated product. The importer is the entity that holds the SLSI certification/inspection records, arranges the SLSEA label registration, and is the contact for the authorities. A foreign manufacturer cannot place the product on the Sri Lanka market without an in-country importer/agent — there is no mechanism analogous to a foreign-appointed authorised representative substituting for a local importer in the way the EU permits.
summary.zh: 投放斯里兰卡市场的货物须由斯里兰卡本地登记进口商引入，进口商为清关、SLSI合格文件、SLSEA能效标签注册及后续市场义务的责任方。电冰箱主要经科伦坡港抵达，由斯里兰卡海关依据进口单据、适用关税/税费及受管制产品所需的任何SLSI进口检验或认证证据进行清关。进口商为持有SLSI认证/检验记录、安排SLSEA标签注册并作为主管机构联络方的实体。外国制造商无本地进口商/代理商即不能将产品投放斯里兰卡市场——不存在类似欧盟所允许的由外国委任授权代表替代本地进口商的机制。
summary.zht: 投放斯里蘭卡市場的貨物須由斯里蘭卡本地登記進口商引入，進口商為清關、SLSI合格文件、SLSEA能效標籤登記及後續市場義務的責任方。電冰箱主要經科倫坡港抵達，由斯里蘭卡海關依據進口單據、適用關稅/稅費及受管制產品所需的任何SLSI進口檢驗或認證證據進行清關。進口商為持有SLSI認證/檢驗記錄、安排SLSEA標籤登記並作為主管機構聯絡方的實體。外國製造商無本地進口商/代理商即不能將產品投放斯里蘭卡市場——不存在類似歐盟所允許的由外國委任授權代表替代本地進口商的機制。

standards_or_laws: Sri Lanka Customs Ordinance — import clearance, duties and taxes
SLSI import inspection / product certification requirement at point of entry (Colombo) for regulated electrical products
Importer-of-record obligation — Sri Lanka-resident entity responsible for conformity documentation and market obligations

summary.en: China has no regulatory mechanism requiring an exporter of refrigerators to appoint a resident representative in the destination country for compliance — Chinese export manufacturers engage overseas distributors or trading companies commercially. Under the domestic CCC regime, the certificate holder is the responsible party for China-market compliance; this role does not extend to or satisfy any foreign import/market-access obligation. The need for a Sri Lanka-resident importer of record is therefore a destination-market requirement with no Chinese statutory analogue.
summary.zh: 中国没有要求电冰箱出口商在目的国指定常驻代表负责合规的监管机制——中国出口制造商以商业方式委任海外经销商或贸易公司。在国内CCC制度下，证书持有人为中国市场合规的责任方；该角色不延伸至或满足任何外国进口/市场准入义务。因此，对斯里兰卡本地登记进口商的需求属于目的地市场要求，在中国法律中无对应规定。
summary.zht: 中國沒有要求電冰箱出口商在目的國指定常駐代表負責合規的監管機制——中國出口製造商以商業方式委任海外經銷商或貿易公司。在國內CCC制度下，證書持有人為中國市場合規的責任方；該角色不延伸至或滿足任何外國進口/市場准入義務。因此，對斯里蘭卡本地登記進口商的需求屬於目的地市場要求，在中國法律中無對應規定。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent requiring appointment of a foreign-country importer of record

gap.en: This is a structural market-access gap with no Chinese analogue: （1） the Chinese manufacturer must have a Sri Lanka-resident importer of record （or appointed local agent/distributor） in place before shipping — there is no EU-style provision allowing a manufacturer-appointed authorised representative to stand in for a local importer; （2） the importer must arrange customs clearance at Colombo, pay applicable duties/taxes, and present SLSI conformity/inspection evidence and SLSEA registration for the regulated product; （3） the importer holds the conformity records and is the responsible contact for SLSI/SLSEA/Customs. Exporters should select and contract a competent Sri Lanka importer early, since that party drives the SLSI certification route, energy-label registration, and clearance timeline. Confirm current duty/tax rates, HS classification, and any import-licensing nuances with the importer and a Sri Lanka customs broker.
gap.zh: 这是一项在中国无对应规定的结构性市场准入差距：（1）中国制造商须在出货前落实斯里兰卡本地登记进口商（或委任的本地代理/经销商）——不存在类欧盟允许由制造商委任授权代表替代本地进口商的规定；（2）进口商须在科伦坡安排清关、缴纳适用关税/税费，并为受管制产品提交SLSI合格/检验证据及SLSEA注册；（3）进口商持有合格记录，并作为SLSI/SLSEA/海关的责任联络方。出口商应尽早选定并签约有能力的斯里兰卡进口商，因为该方主导SLSI认证路径、能效标签注册及清关时间表。请向进口商及斯里兰卡报关行确认现行关税/税率、HS归类及任何进口许可细节。
gap.zht: 這是一項在中國無對應規定的結構性市場准入差距：（1）中國製造商須在出貨前落實斯里蘭卡本地登記進口商（或委任的本地代理/經銷商）——不存在類歐盟允許由製造商委任授權代表替代本地進口商的規定；（2）進口商須在科倫坡安排清關、繳納適用關稅/稅費，並為受管制產品提交SLSI合格/檢驗證據及SLSEA登記；（3）進口商持有合格記錄，並作為SLSI/SLSEA/海關的責任聯絡方。出口商應盡早選定並簽約有能力的斯里蘭卡進口商，因為該方主導SLSI認證路徑、能效標籤登記及清關時間表。請向進口商及斯里蘭卡報關行確認現行關稅/稅率、HS歸類及任何進口許可細節。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a Sri Lanka-resident importer of record and customs clearance at Colombo are required to place refrigerators on the Sri Lanka market
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to appoint a foreign importer of record under Chinese law

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Sri Lanka-resident importer of record is required to clear refrigerators through the Port of Colombo and place them on the market; unlike the EU, there is no manufacturer-appointed authorised-representative substitute. The importer holds SLSI conformity and SLSEA registration documentation. Contract a competent Sri Lanka importer/customs broker early and confirm current duties, HS classification, and import-licensing details.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 须由斯里兰卡本地登记进口商在科伦坡港清关并将电冰箱投放市场；与欧盟不同，斯里兰卡无由制造商委任授权代表的替代机制。进口商持有SLSI合格性及SLSEA注册文件。请尽早签约有能力的斯里兰卡进口商/报关行，并确认现行关税、HS归类及进口许可细节。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 須由斯里蘭卡本地登記進口商在科倫坡港清關並將電冰箱投放市場；與歐盟不同，斯里蘭卡無由製造商委任授權代表的替代機制。進口商持有SLSI合格性及SLSEA登記文件。請盡早簽約有能力的斯里蘭卡進口商/報關行，並確認現行關稅、HS歸類及進口許可細節。
